Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Amy's Chocolate Chip Cookies

Want to hear the creator's life story? Click here.
Yield 2 dozen
Preparation time 20m
Cook time 10m
Total time 1h
Ingredients
  • 1/2 Cup unsalted butter, softened (113g)
  • 1/2 Cup white sugar (100g)
  • 1/2 Cup brown sugar, packed (110g)
  • 1 egg
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1/2 tsp baking soda
  • 1 tsp hot water
  • 1/4 tsp salt
  • 1 1/2 Cups all-purpose flour, sifted (180g)
  • 1 Cup semi-sweet chocolate chips
Instructions
  1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
  2. Cream together butter, white sugar, and brown sugar.
  3. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
  4. Dissolve baking soda in hot water and add to batter, along with salt.
  5. Mix in flour.
  6. Shape dough into flat square and press chocolate chips into dough.
  7. Shape into 1 inch balls, spaced 1 inch apart on baking sheet.
  8. Bake for 10 minutes, rotating sheet halfway through.
